name: Dr Dabber Ghost 2 Glass MouthPiece
summary: Dabber Ghost 2 Glass Mouthpiece is an official replacement and upgrade component developed specifically for the Dr.
description: Dabber Ghost 2 Glass Mouthpiece is an official replacement and upgrade component developed specifically for the Dr. Dabber Ghost 2 Vaporiser. Compatible exclusively with: Dr. Dabber Ghost 2 Vaporiser Not compatible with: Original Ghost or earlier Dr. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
